title: Viltrumite
description: Become Omni-Man or any other Viltrumite from Invincible and never go into aura debt. This mod is created and updated as a part of my video series on Youtube where I code it into reality (in Turkish).
body:
This mod requires [Viltrumite Flight 1.3.0+](https://modrinth.com/mod/viltrumite-flight) and is meant to be played in **third** person. 

_Please note that this mod is in an early stage of development. Many features are still being actively worked on and you may encounter bugs or incomplete mechanics._

Flying through blocks

![1](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdDc5OWFjeXVwem94OHN0YjN5MzNucDFremx2OW5qcHVrd2k5dm5sZCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/oZfvbuDXJfFFeTn9rW/giphy.gif)

POV: Your friend zooooms away into a pixel (you better catch up to him) (DASH + CTRL(your sprint key) while hovering)

![2](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeDNtMzBhdDJmaHU4ODVldWdiMnlvNnNnZG42MjJ4em5ibmZ6aGN6NCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/9YUiMDUfCVMUkD4sfi/giphy.gif)


POV: Your friend teaches you the ways of Viltrum

![3](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaTdsNmNsYzNnM2g5ZnRrbDAycnBtZzgxMm9xdzZiZms0cXh5aDZzaSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/7fFVDpjYE9S3g0okLO/giphy.gif)


POV: Your friend is throwing hands with the air

![4](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExazZzcTdudXRiZGJqYWZhbzFva3l0eTBxNndqMDFpbWIzc29laHpndCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/gKQmIe1CvlQ65eEpx7/giphy.gif)


Just reminding these weak insignificant creatures who the real boss is

![5](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbmplM25uNnAxY2dieGZrZml3dzdrOGNoOHg2MXd0Y3p6Zjk3YnFpOCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/qCafnpFUd3PF5K2tuN/giphy.gif)


Skills

Punch: Throw a heavy punch to send your enemies flying.

Dash: Dash forward with force to smash through blocks and mobs in your path.

Dash-Flight Acceleration: Hold CTRL right after dashing to instantly go into supersonic flight.

Target Locking: Lock onto your enemies to track their every move.

Grabbing: Grab any mob/player and carry them around as you fly.

Blocking: Block attacks to take significantly less damage (70%).

The mod automatically creates a viltrumitetextures folder inside your .minecraft directory and extracts the default skins (Omni-Man, Lucan, etc.) and the red cape into your folders if they are empty on startup.

| Command | What it does | Who can use it? |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| `/viltrumite skin <name>` | Applies the specified mod skin to the character. | Everyone |
| `/viltrumite skin off` | Removes the active skin and reverts to the original look. | Everyone |
| `/viltrumite cape <name>` | Equips a cape to the character. | Everyone |
| `/viltrumite cape off` | Removes the cape. | Everyone |
| `/viltrumite model default` | Sets the character model to normal (thick) arms. | Everyone |
| `/viltrumite model slim` | Sets the character model to slim arms. | Everyone |
| `/viltrumite power` | Grants Viltrumite powers to the player who ran the command. | OP (Admin) |
| `/viltrumite power <player>` | Grants Viltrumite powers to the specified player. | OP (Admin) |
| `/viltrumite depower` | Removes Viltrumite powers from the player who ran the command. | OP (Admin) |
| `/viltrumite depower <player>`| Removes Viltrumite powers from the specified player. | OP (Admin) |
